raw.subject: Your Rochester page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

You specialize in providing in-home pet sitting services in Rochester, Minnesota, which I think is a great niche.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and that might be costing you potential bookings from people who prefer to research and book services online.

I sketched a page idea that could help you showcase your services, share photos of happy clients, and make it easy for people to get in touch with you. I'd love to discuss how a simple website could benefit your business further. We can discuss a flat fee that works for local businesses like yours.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/cat-s-meow-cat-sitting-rochester
